description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single job named deploy (default stage) that runs the commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/mtnygard/m2m.router ., and docker push registry.gitlab.com/mtnygard/m2m.router. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
